series_metadata.series_description: File maintained for each employee which may include, but is not limited to items such as application/resume, new hire documentation, position descriptions, human resource requests, recommendation for hire, personnel actions, training records, change of address forms, emergency contact information, letters of commendation, policy and procedure acknowledgements, performance evaluations, disciplinary documents, and separation records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain portions used to verify employment, retirement, or OPERS contributions 50 years after separation for employees prior to 2012. Purge all other records seven years after separation then transfer to Ohio Department of Administrative Services to retain permanently. ; Electronic: Retain portions used to verify employment, retirement, or OPERS contributions 50 years after separation for employees prior to 2012. Purge all other records seven years after separation then transfer to Ohio Department of Administrative Services to retain permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
